raw_jd:
Key Responsibilities:

1. Guide students on manual & automation testing concepts.
2. Help with interview preparation & mock interviews.
3. Resolve doubts and improve problem-solving skills.
4. Support resume and placement readiness.

gemini_verdict.experience_reason: The job description does not specify an experience requirement, which defaults to fresher eligibility under the provided instructions.
gemini_verdict.profile_reason: The candidate has a background in AI/ML and software development, but the role requires specific expertise in manual and automation testing which the candidate lacks.
gemini_verdict.title: Student Mentor
gemini_verdict.summary: This role is a Student Mentor position focused on guiding students through testing methodologies and interview preparation. The candidate's profile is oriented toward software development and AI engineering rather than testing instruction.
gemini_verdict.match_reason: The candidate has a background in AI/ML and software development, but the role requires specific expertise in manual and automation testing which the candidate lacks.
